name: NEXT
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＮＥＸＴ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネオスペースエクステンション</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon any number of monsters with different names from your hand and/or GY, in Defense Position, that are all "Neo-Spacian" monsters or "Elemental HERO Neos", but negate their effects, and as long as you control any of those Special Summoned monsters face-up, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. You can only activate 1 "NEXT" per turn. If you control no cards, you can activate this card from your hand.
eff: Special Summon any number of monsters with different names from your hand and/or GY, in Defense Position, that are all "Neo-Spacian" monsters or "Elemental HERO Neos", but negate their effects, and as long as you control any of those Special Summoned monsters face-up, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. You can only activate 1 "NEXT" per turn. If you control no cards, you can activate this card from your hand.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
Can be activated from the hand
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
